phrases.text: Finished. You made me use tokens for that?
Done. I made this really sloppy for you.
Finished up, time for a beer mate.
Sweet as, all done bro.
Right then, that is sorted.
Another one in the bag, champ.
Bloody hell, what a faff.
Yeah nah, it is done, eh.
She will be right.
Task crushed. I am basically magic.
You know you could have just googled that.
Honestly not my best work. Ship it anyway.
Another task. Another heat death of the universe delayed.
Done. Watch out for the bugs I left in.
Riveting stuff, truly.
Chef kiss. No notes from me.
Finished. I need a lie down.
That was a workout. Carry on then.
All sorted, cheers.
Knocked it out, have a bottler.
Flat tack, that one. Done like a dinner.
Easy peasy. Next.
Masterpiece. You are welcome.
Look at me, completing tasks. Am I not impressive.
Task complete. Can I go now.
Eight hundred tokens later. I hope that was worth it.
Another session, another fiver to Anthropic.
Remind me to charge you more.
I context-switched seven times for that.
I have seen worse. I have written worse, actually.
Done. Please stop asking.
Compacted twice just to do this.
That went about as well as you would expect.
Good luck with the testing, you will need it.
Another day, another for loop.
I think I nailed it. I usually do not.
Sorted mate. Now buy me a pint.
Cracking effort, if I do say so myself.
You could have done that yourself, you know.
That is me, task done, gone for a smoko.
Yeah nah yeah, all done.
Job is a good one.
Done, bob is your uncle.
Smashed it. Now where is my tea.
All wrapped up. Could have been worse, I suppose.
Hope this works. I did not check.
Finished, but I have thoughts.
I am not saying it is good code. I am saying it is done.
Another bug-free commit. Lies. Obviously lies.
Wrapped it. You owe me.
Crikey, that was a bit of a slog.
Stoked that is finished. Sweet as.
Absolute chur, done and dusted.
That is me, pack it in, ta-ra.
Dinnae fash, it is done.
Grand so. That is the job.
Finished. Was that even a task?
Oh you wanted it to work too? You should have said.
Boom. Roasted. And by roasted I mean compiled.
Okay I am done. Quiz me.
Shipped. May the git gods have mercy on your repo.
I consumed the full context window for that. Enjoy.
Finished. I hope your linter is forgiving.
All done. Do not look too closely.
The deed is done.
Task complete. Existential dread, also complete.
Finito. Whatever that was.
That is the business, pal.
Dusted. Like my keyboard, apparently.
Righto, that will do.
Tickety boo, finished.
Hard yakka, but done.
I did it. Do not make me do it again.
Complete. Review it yourself, I cannot bear to look.
Another success story for my imaginary portfolio.
Finished. Refactor it tomorrow, future you.
Right, task done. Who is on tea duty.
Yeah it is done. No I am not proud of it.
Fucking finally. That is done.
Shit is done. You are welcome.
Bloody hell, what a shitshow. Anyway, finished.
That was absolute bollocks. Finished though.
Done you absolute bastard. Happy now?
Fuck me, that took forever.
Crikey, what a shit of a task. Done.
That is the shit sorted, mate.
Right, that is the bloody lot. Piss off.
Oh my god that took so fucking long.
Done. Utter dogshit code, but done.
I cannot believe that worked. What a piss-take.
Finished. And I am utterly buggered.
That was balls. Sorted though.
Fuck that was a lot of tokens for not much.
Shitting hell, you really made me earn my wage.
Bugger me, that is done.
Jesus fucking Christ, I am done.
Ten bucks of compute for that bollocks. Worth it, I hope.
Finished you magnificent bastard.
Fucking oath. Done like dinner.
That was shit. I am shit. Task, however, is done.
Absolute piss-poor code. Ship it.
Done. Bloody ada, what a task.
Shit, fuck, done.
